svg.text: Gathering inputs - template, defaults and config
Stage 1 - Load and merge - inputs flow into the pipeline
Stage 2 - Validate - merged config checked against schema
Stage 3 - Init provider - provider selected, 4 coral dots arrive
Stage 3 - Provider ready, pipeline advances to packages
Stage 4 - Packages - repo and cache dots arrive
Stage 4 - Packages ready, pipeline advances to compose
Stage 5 - Compose - chroot cache arrives, OS installed
Stage 5 - Compose ready, pipeline advances to signing
Stage 6 - Image signing - secure boot keys applied
Stage 7 - Post-process - SBOM generated, artifacts written
